title: Example input for MAPP workflow
author: Bak Maciej
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Small test dataset for MAPP workflow: 

 
	 5mln reads sampled from two paired-end RNA-seq samples of the GEO record: GSE69656 
	 100 arbitrarily chosen Position Weight Matrices for RNA binding proteins and their sequence logos 
	 configuration template for the workflow (YAML) 
	 experiment design table (TSV) 
	 Genomic annotation for human: chr21 (GTF) 
	 Genomic sequence for human: chr21 (FASTA) 
	 PolyAsite Atlas 2.0 annotation: chr21 (BED)
